creator: freebsd@michael-bueker.de
text:
Created attachment 229344
portstree patch for update to 6.18.5

Upstream changes:

- IMAP: Deal better with untagged status updates
- UnicodeDecodeError: 'utf-8' codec can't decode byte 0xa9 in position 0: invalid start byte
- getmail_fetch: TypeError: method expected 2 arguments, got 3
